What We Supply

Our Products

Ventilation Fans · Air Cleaners · Electrical Panels

01 — Ventilation

Mixed FlowInline Fan

Mixed Flow Inline Fan — MF Series

Mixed Flow ImpellerIP44 RatedLow Noise50,000 h Life-20°C to 60°CSupply & Exhaust

High-performance mixed flow inline fans for residential, commercial and industrial ducted ventilation. Available in five duct sizes from 100 mm to 315 mm, the MF Series combines the best characteristics of axial and centrifugal fans — delivering high static pressure with low noise at every duty point.

Model Specifications

ModelPowerAirflowPressureNoise
MF-10030W205 m³/h132 Pa31 dB(A)
MF-15058W530 m³/h300 Pa33 dB(A)
MF-200140W840 m³/h350 Pa63 dB(A)
MF-250200W1400 m³/h489 Pa66 dB(A)
MF-315400W2200 m³/h690 Pa69 dB(A)
02 — Ventilation

CircularInline Fan

Compact circular inline duct fans designed for kitchen, bathroom, ensuite and office extract and supply air applications. The CI Series mounts in any position, connects directly to standard circular ducting and can be removed for maintenance without disturbing the duct run.

Model Specifications

ModelPowerAirflowPressureNoise
CI-10025W180 m³/h120 Pa30 dB(A)
CI-15045W450 m³/h250 Pa32 dB(A)
CI-20095W750 m³/h300 Pa38 dB(A)
CI-250150W1200 m³/h420 Pa42 dB(A)
CI-315350W1900 m³/h580 Pa48 dB(A)
Circular Inline DesignIP44 RatedCompact & QuietDirect Duct ConnectionSupply & ExhaustEasy Maintenance

Circular Inline Duct Fan — CI Series

03 — Air Purification

Electrostatic AirCleaner (Dry Scrubber)

KET Series — Electrostatic Air Cleaner

The KET Series electrostatic air cleaner uses charged aluminium plates to capture grease, smoke and particles as fine as 0.1 micron — with up to 99% filtration efficiency. No disposable filters, no costly replacements; just periodic cleaning. Optional UVGI ozone lamps and odour remover modules extend the system for the most demanding environments.

Specifications

  • Series: KET (Smoke Eater)
  • Technology: ESP
  • Air Volume: 7,500–10,000 CFM
  • Efficiency: 95–99%
  • Power: 190 W
  • Material: Stainless Steel
  • Operating Temp: up to 80°C
  • Warranty: 1 Year

Optional Add-ons

  • UVGI Ozone System
  • AutoKleen Wash
  • Odour Remover Module
  • Carbon V-Bank Filter
  • BMS Integration
  • Remote Monitoring
More Details at ESPair ↗
04 — Electrical Solutions

ElectricalPanels

Designed and built in partnership with Acton Power Solutions, Bengaluru. Each panel is custom-engineered to your facility's load profile, compliance requirements and site conditions.

AHU Starter Panels

Purpose-built for Air Handling Unit motor control — with soft-start, auto/manual modes, motor overload protection and inter-lock capability for multi-unit installations.

  • Soft-start / DOL starters
  • Auto & Manual modes
  • Motor overload protection
  • Multi-unit interlocking
  • Ammeter & voltmeter
  • Emergency stop circuit

LT Distribution Panels

Low-tension distribution panels for commercial and industrial power distribution — complete with MCBs, MCCBs, bus bars and metering for accurate load monitoring.

  • MCCB incomer protection
  • Sub-circuit MCBs
  • Copper bus bars
  • Energy metering
  • Earth fault protection
  • IP54 enclosure

Basement Ventilation Panels

Dedicated control panels for basement car park ventilation — integrated with CO sensors and jet fan controllers to automatically regulate fresh-air extract fans.

  • CO sensor integration
  • Jet fan controllers
  • Auto/manual fan control
  • Alarm annunciator
  • Fire signal interface
  • BMS connectivity

CPM Panels

Centralised Power Management panels for monitoring and controlling multiple electrical circuits from a single interface — with load scheduling and energy logging.

  • Multi-circuit monitoring
  • Load scheduling
  • Energy data logging
  • Remote on/off control
  • Demand management
  • SCADA-ready outputs
Full Details at Acton Power Solutions ↗
